name: SQLite Database Connector
description: Allows an Antigravity agent to connect to a local SQLite database via the Model Context Protocol. Exposes query, insert, update, delete, and schema-inspection tools over an MCP stdio bridge.
author: Antigravity

SQLITE_DB_PATH.description: Absolute path to the SQLite database file the agent should connect to.

tools.name: sqlite_query
tools.description: Execute a read-only SQL SELECT statement against the connected SQLite database and return the result rows as JSON.

sql.description: The SQL SELECT query to execute.

tools.name: sqlite_execute
tools.description: Execute a write SQL statement (INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, CREATE, DROP) against the connected SQLite database.

tools.name: sqlite_list_tables
tools.description: Return the names of all tables in the connected SQLite database.

tools.name: sqlite_describe_table
tools.description: Return the column names and types for a given table in the SQLite database.

configFields.label: SQLite Database Path
configFields.helpText: Select or paste the absolute path to your .db or .sqlite file.
